description: A Volkswagen sedan viewed from the side in dim nighttime light (image appears clear). The vehicle shows used wear with tinted curved windows. It features off angular headlights and angular taillights, complemented by a horizontal grille with straight edges. The clean sloped roof sits above new medium regular tires with intact bumpers. Side mirrors are intact. License plate is visible. Spoiler is not present. Roof rack is not present. Exhaust system features hidden pipes.
